description_long: This washing machine features a boxy, rectangular form with a smooth, light gray exterior. The front face is dominated by a large, circular front-loading door with a blue-tinted window and a prominent dark gray handle. Above the door, there is a control panel with a rotary dial, several buttons, a digital display, and a small label area. The sides of the machine have vertical indented panels, adding subtle texture and structural reinforcement. The rear view shows a coiled hose and a service panel, typical of washing machines for water and drainage connections. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for placement in urban environments such as laundromats, apartment buildings, or garages.
description: A modern, light gray front-loading washing machine with a blue-tinted door, rotary dial, and digital control panel. It features indented side panels and a rear hose connection.
description_view_0: The left side view shows a plain, light gray panel with vertical indented lines for structural detail.
description_view_1: The front view displays the circular blue-tinted door, control panel with dial, buttons, digital display, and a small label area.
description_view_2: The right side view mirrors the left, with vertical indented lines and a smooth, uninterrupted surface.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals a coiled hose, a service panel, and a vent, indicating water and drainage connections.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located at the top front of the machine, featuring a rotary dial on the left, a row of four buttons and a digital display on the right, and a small label area on the far left.
attribute_door_type: Front-loading, circular porthole door with a blue-tinted glass window and a dark gray plastic handle.
attribute_brand_logo: A small rectangular logo is visible on the upper left of the front panel, featuring a white background with colored elements and some unreadable text.
attribute_detergent_drawer_location: The detergent drawer is located on the upper left of the front panel, adjacent to the control panel, and is integrated as a pull-out compartment.
attribute_drum_visibility: partially; the blue-tinted glass window allows partial visibility into the drum interior.
